positive: A celestial forest scene printed on a seamless pattern repeat. The composition features stylized, glowing flora and fauna suspended between massive, intertwined bioluminescent roots. Key elements include abstract, glowing glyph-like leaves and stylized, nocturnal forest animals (e.g., deer, foxes, owls) rendered in clean silhouettes against a deep indigo and teal background. The color palette must utilize contrasting neon accents (electric cyan, magenta, lime green) against rich midnight blue and deep purple, ensuring high contrast and visibility when printed on fabric. The artwork style should be highly detailed, vaporwave-influenced neo-tribal etching, maintaining a balanced, symmetrical, and central focus suitable for repeat textile printing. Cinematic, highly detailed, glowing edges, deep saturation, mystical atmosphere, clean linework, vector art style, volumetric lighting.
negative: low quality, blurry, ugly, text, signature, watermark, artifacts, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, messy, clutter, poorly drawn, copyright, logo, trademark
